blocker: True across-seed variance/CI is NOT MEASURED: train_rft*.py expose no --seed flag and no log has a seed field; a real seed CI needs the (delivered, git-apply-verified) patch + 5 GPU re-runs on the HUD Tinker backend (HUD_API_KEY + forked slug).
one_line: Built a stdlib multi-seed variance analyzer (tested 10/10), a git-apply-verified --seed patch for train_rft_v2.py, and a multi-seed driver; reported real observable variance from 3 actual RFT logs (plateau std 0.0071-0.0302, within-step spread ~0.17-0.18, cross-config std 0.0269) and documented that true seed-variance CI is blocked on GPU re-runs.
